full_text:
Zhou Jun 周峻
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Jun (周峻). A nephew of Zhou Yu. Was a trusted and capable subordinate of Lu Xun. Captured Shiyang from Wei by causing its citizens to panic. Zhou Jun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
